req.title: Open checking account (boundary variant)
req.statement: A verified customer shall be able to open a checking account with an initial deposit between $25 and $50,000; deposits outside this range shall be rejected. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-026 mandates deposit boundary validation (25–50000 USD) for checking account creation by verified customers. Test suite covers: (1) positive case with valid deposit in midrange (EP), (2) boundary cases at exact min/max thresholds (BVA), (3) negative cases below/above bounds and unverified state (NEG/DT). All tests verify account creation, notification dispatch, and rejection codes. Tests are deterministic, idempotent, and traceable to requirement statements.

tests.name: test_open_checking_account_valid_deposit_midrange
preconditions: customer has no prior checking account
actions: retrieve created account ID from response
trace: R-FIN-026: A verified customer shall be able to open a checking account with initial deposit between $25 and $50,000
Expected outcome: account created; welcome-notification dispatched
tests.executable:
import requests
import pytest

@pytest.mark.parametrize('deposit', [1000])
def test_open_checking_account_valid_deposit_midrange(deposit):
    customer_id = '<setup_verified_customer>'
    payload = {
        'customer_id': customer_id,
        'deposit': deposit
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        'http://banking-api/accounts/checking',
        json=payload,
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer <token>'}
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['account_type'] == 'checking'
    assert data['balance'] == deposit
    assert data['status'] == 'active'
    notif = <check_notification_dispatched>(customer_id)
    assert notif is not None
    assert notif['type'] == 'welcome'

tests.name: test_open_checking_account_deposit_below_minimum
preconditions: customer has no prior checking account
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_open_checking_account_deposit_below_minimum():
    customer_id = '<setup_verified_customer>'
    payload = {
        'customer_id': customer_id,
        'deposit': 24
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        'http://banking-api/accounts/checking',
        json=payload,
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer <token>'}
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['error_code'] == 'DEPOSIT_BELOW_MINIMUM'
    assert 'minimum deposit is $25' in data['message']
    acct = <query_account>(customer_id)
    assert acct is None
    notif = <check_notification_dispatched>(customer_id)
    assert notif is None

preconditions: customer has no prior checking account

import requests

def test_open_checking_account_deposit_above_maximum():
    customer_id = '<setup_verified_customer>'
    payload = {
        'customer_id': customer_id,
        'deposit': 50001
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        'http://banking-api/accounts/checking',
        json=payload,
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer <token>'}
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['error_code'] == 'DEPOSIT_EXCEEDS_MAXIMUM'
    assert 'maximum deposit is $50,000' in data['message']
    acct = <query_account>(customer_id)
    assert acct is None
    notif = <check_notification_dispatched>(customer_id)
    assert notif is None

tests.name: test_open_checking_account_unverified_customer
preconditions: customer has no prior checking account
trace: R-FIN-026: Precondition customer.verified = true must be enforced
Error pathway: 403 when customer not verified
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_open_checking_account_unverified_customer():
    customer_id = '<setup_unverified_customer>'
    payload = {
        'customer_id': customer_id,
        'deposit': 1000
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        'http://banking-api/accounts/checking',
        json=payload,
        headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer <token>'}
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 403
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['error_code'] == 'CUSTOMER_NOT_VERIFIED'
    acct = <query_account>(customer_id)
    assert acct is None
